tasks.label: Stop Uvicorn (8000)
tasks.command: $proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if ($proc) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Stopped PID $proc on :8000" } else { Write-Host "No listener on :8000" }
